fixes.origin:
clause = "ORDER BY " + sort_field + " DESC"
command = "SELECT id, subject, status FROM tickets " + clause
cur.execute(command)
fixes.replacement:
if sort_field not in _ALLOWED_FIELDS:
    sort_field = "created_at"
clause = "ORDER BY " + sort_field + " DESC"
command = "SELECT id, subject, status FROM tickets " + clause
cur.execute(command)
